mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pg_operational_event (instance_id,source,category,event_type,severity,database_name,user_name,object_name, query_id,sql_state,message,fingerprint,payload,sensitive_redacted,event_time) VALUES
(#{instanceId},#{it.source},#{it.category},#{it.eventType},#{it.severity}, #{it.databaseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{it.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{it.objectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{it.queryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{it.sqlState,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{it.message,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{it.fingerprint,jdbcType=VARCHAR},CAST(#{it.payloadJson} AS jsonb),#{it.sensitiveRedacted}, to_timestamp(#{it.eventTimeMillis}/1000.0))
